mnemonics.title: Mobile Threats
mnemonics.content: **T**heft, **W**i-Fi attacks, **M**alicious apps, **O**S vulns, **P**hishing, **J**ailbreak = **TWMOPJ** (Think: Twice When Mobile Opens Phone Jokingly).

mnemonics.title: MDM vs MAM
mnemonics.content: **MDM** = **M**anage the **D**evice (whole thing). **MAM** = **M**anage the **A**pp (just corporate data). MDM for company devices, MAM for BYOD.
